title: macrocycle_nanobot_cross_v1 — CROSS-AXIS W1b output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/macrocycle_nanobot_cross.py. CROSS-AXIS integration W1b: a macrocyclic ligand covalently attached to a DNA-origami / C0b nanostructure pays a smaller binding-entropy penalty than its acyclic analog would, so the MACROCYCLE :> WEAVE sub-axis's Jacobson-Stockmayer cyclization pre-organization adds a favourable ddG_preorg ≤ 0 entry to the NANOBOT core-5 axis's display-affinity ledger. For each device in a deterministic macrocycle-decorated-nanostructure panel, the MACROCYCLE sub-axis's conformational_entropy (macrocycle_sim.py, imported verbatim — no fork; Jacobson-Stockmayer 1950 + Boltzmann S = R*ln W) computes W_conf / S_conf and the binding-entropy penalty for both the macrocycle and its acyclic analog (same n_rotatable_total, n_in_ring = 0); ddG_preorg = penalty(macro) − penalty(acyclic) ≤ 0 and is gated against an illustrative ledger gate (kcal/mol). CRITICAL RESEARCH-STAGE HONESTY: macrocycle-decorated DNA nanostructures are an ACTIVE RESEARCH FIELD (Yang / Liu DNA-templated synthesis of macrocycles; Schmidt-Mende-style decorated nanostructures) but are NOT an FDA-approved drug class. No FDA-approved macrocycle-decorated DNA nanobot therapeutic exists. The rotatable-bond counts, n_in_ring, f_ring and ledger-gate values are illustrative modeling choices. In-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2) — NOT a structural / binding-affinity / display-affinity / nanodevice-function / therapeutic / regulatory claim. No W_conf / S_conf / ddG_preorg / count is derived from the n=6 lattice (g2/f_lattice_fit). Modality precedent is researcher-class (Rothemund 2006 DNA origami + Yang/Liu DNA-templated-synthesis macrocycle research), NEVER lattice-derived (g3/f1). A cross-axis bridge is NOT a new axis: the hexa-bio core-5 set (QUANTUM, WEAVE, NANOBOT, RIBOZYME, VIROCAPSID) is UNCHANGED.

device_id.description: Identifier of the macrocycle-decorated DNA nanostructure from the deterministic device panel.

device_note.description: Illustrative design note describing the nanostructure-class + attached-ligand-class.

attached_ligand_class.description: Label of the macrocyclic ligand class attached to the DNA nanostructure (e.g. lorlatinib_class_small_macrocycle, rapamycin_class_macrolide, cyclosporine_class_cyclic_peptide). Illustrative class label, NOT a fit to a specific compound.

anchor_position.description: Illustrative anchor position on the DNA nanostructure (e.g. staple 5'-amine, staple 3'-azide).

nanobot_axis_source.description: Path to the NANOBOT core axis source whose DNA-nanotech modality basis is read as structural text (actuation logic untouched — f3).

nanobot_axis_role.description: Role of the NANOBOT core-5 axis (DNA-nanotechnology actuation).

modality_basis_cited_by_axis.description: DNA-nanotech modality citations the NANOBOT axis declares for itself (Rothemund 2006 DNA origami / Seeman 1982 immobile junctions) — own precedent, never lattice-derived (g3/f1).

macrocycle_model.description: The MACROCYCLE :> WEAVE sub-axis model string — must reference Jacobson-Stockmayer ring-closure and Boltzmann S = R*ln W.

temperature_K.description: Temperature used for the -T * deltaS binding-entropy penalty (K).

ring_constraint_factor_f_ring.description: Ring constraint factor f_ring in (0,1] from macrocycle_sim — in-ring effective rotamer multiplicity = f_ring * g_free.

n_rotatable_bonds_total.description: Total number of rotatable bonds in the ligand (same value for macrocycle and acyclic analog).

n_bonds_in_ring.description: Number of rotatable bonds inside the macrocyclic ring (= 0 for the acyclic analog). Must not exceed n_rotatable_bonds_total.

n_bonds_free_macrocycle.description: Number of free rotatable bonds in the macrocycle = n_rotatable_bonds_total - n_bonds_in_ring.

conformational_microstates_W_acyclic.description: W_conf of the acyclic analog with the same n_rotatable_total but n_bonds_in_ring = 0.

S_conf_macrocycle_cal_per_mol_K.description: Boltzmann conformational entropy S_conf = R*ln W of the macrocycle (cal/mol/K, non-negative).

S_conf_acyclic_cal_per_mol_K.description: Boltzmann conformational entropy S_conf = R*ln W of the acyclic analog (cal/mol/K, non-negative).

binding_entropy_penalty_macrocycle_kcal_.description: Binding conformational-entropy penalty -T*deltaS_conf of the macrocycle (kcal/mol, non-negative — the entropy lost on freezing into the bound conformer).

binding_entropy_penalty_acyclic_kcal_per.description: Binding conformational-entropy penalty -T*deltaS_conf of the acyclic analog (kcal/mol, non-negative).

ddg_preorg_kcal_per_mol.description: Cyclization entropic advantage ddG_preorg = penalty(macrocycle) - penalty(acyclic) (kcal/mol). MUST be ≤ 0 by the Jacobson-Stockmayer hard floor: a ring can only REMOVE conformers (W_macro ≤ W_acyclic).

preorg_is_favourable.description: Always true — ddG_preorg ≤ 0 is the Jacobson-Stockmayer hard floor.

macrocycle_fewer_microstates.description: Always true — W_macro ≤ W_acyclic by the ring-closure principle (a constraint can only REMOVE microstates).

display_affinity_ledger_gate_kcal_per_mo.description: Illustrative ledger gate (kcal/mol). The cyclization entry is judged favourable on the display-affinity ledger iff ddG_preorg ≤ this gate. NOT measured, NOT lattice-derived.

display_affinity_ledger_margin_kcal_per_.description: display_affinity_ledger_gate_kcal_per_mol minus ddg_preorg_kcal_per_mol (kcal/mol). Non-negative iff ledger_favourable.

ledger_favourable.description: True iff ddG_preorg ≤ display_affinity_ledger_gate_kcal_per_mol — favourable cyclization entry on the display-affinity ledger.

in_silico_caveat.description: Restatement that every row is in-silico simulator-consistency only (g8/f2).

illustrative_only.description: Always true — the device panel, rotatable-bond counts, n_in_ring, f_ring and ledger gate are illustrative; the row is not a prediction of real macrocycle-decorated-nanostructure behaviour.

creates_a_new_axis.description: Always false — this cross rests on existing :> WEAVE MACROCYCLE sub-axis + core NANOBOT axis; core-5 set (QUANTUM, WEAVE, NANOBOT, RIBOZYME, VIROCAPSID) is UNCHANGED.

research_stage_modality.description: Always true — macrocycle-decorated DNA nanostructures are an active research field but NOT an FDA-approved drug class. There is no FDA-approved macrocycle-decorated DNA nanobot therapeutic. The modality precedent is researcher-class (Yang / Liu DNA-templated synthesis of macrocycles; Schmidt-Mende-style decorated nanostructures), never a drug-class claim.
